title: elsholtzia splendens var. splendens
intro: Elsholtzia splendens var. splendens, also known as Vietnamese mint or mountain balm, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elsholtzia splendens var. splendens include its potential to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and topical applications for various health benefits.
